framework.name: Recursive Delegation as Unsolved Problem
framework.description: Paper identifies recursive delegation (agents spawning sub-agents creating authorization chains) as a critical future challenge with 'no clear scope attenuation mechanisms.' This confirms gap_2 — no production solution exists for multi-hop token exchange. The framing as 'future challenge' rather than 'here's how we solved it' is telling.
framework.raw_quote: Recursive delegation creates risks. Agents spawning sub-agents or communicating tasks to other agents create complex authorization chains without clear scope attenuation mechanisms.
